# 第三章 基于联邦语义锚点与解耦架构的知识图谱对齐框架

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.1-problem.qmd >}}

## 3.2 框架设计

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.2-framework/3.2.1-overview.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.2-framework/3.2.2-semantic.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.2-framework/3.2.3-structure.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.2-framework/3.2.4-maturity.qmd >}}

## 3.3 实验与分析

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.3-experiments/3.3.1-setup.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.3-experiments/3.3.2-results.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.3-experiments/3.3.3-ablation.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.3-experiments/3.3.4-privacy.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch3/3.4-summary.qmd >}}
